description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rustic, weathered finish. The upper section features two large glass-paneled doors with decorative framing, allowing visibility into the interior, while the lower section has two solid wooden doors. The cabinet stands on small, rounded feet and has a rectangular, flat top suitable for placing objects. The wood grain and distressed texture give it a vintage or antique appearance, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, shops, or residential spaces. Metal handles are visible on the doors, indicating that the compartments are openable for storage or display purposes.
description: A tall, rustic wooden cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors and solid lower doors, featuring a weathered finish and metal handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-paneled upper doors and two solid lower doors with visible handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the cabinet's depth and continuous wood grain texture, with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, solid wooden back with a distressed finish and no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the cabinet's depth and uninterrupted wood surface.
